'''Matrix armor''' was a type of material and a specific armored suit.

==History==
The material was used in the construction of [[Starship/Legends|starship]] hulls<ref name="TCSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> and could be made into a heavy [[Armor/Legends|armored]] suit, which was stronger than [[Durasteel/Legends|durasteel]] and [[Titanium/Legends|titanium]]. As such, it offered a high degree of protection, which could be improved by the use of various upgrades. Though few military engineers would call matrix armor a pretty design, it was effective. With the matrix armor plating in patterns similar to those used by [[Reinforced fiber armor|fiber]] and [[mesh armor]], the wearer of a suit of matrix armor could turn aside energy-weapon attacks that would otherwise be devastating.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''
